mcpEnable.label: Enable MCP tools
mcpEnable.description: Allow users to select enabled MCP tools in conversations.

maxSelectedTools.label: Selectable tools per message
maxSelectedTools.description: Maximum MCP tools a user can select for one message. Default 32, maximum 128.

maxLLMCalls.label: Max LLM requests
maxLLMCalls.description: Total LLM requests allowed in one message, including the first request and final summary. Default 5, minimum 2.

maxToolCalls.label: Max MCP tool calls
maxToolCalls.description: Total MCP tool calls allowed in one message. Failed calls count toward the limit. Default 8.

maxConcurrentCalls.label: MCP tool concurrency
maxConcurrentCalls.description: Maximum concurrent MCP tool calls per service instance. Default 8.

toolTimeout.label: MCP tool timeout
toolTimeout.description: Maximum wait time for one MCP tool call, in seconds. Default 10.

toolRetry.label: MCP tool retries
toolRetry.description: Retry count after an MCP tool call fails. Default 0.

bulkConfirm.title: Confirm bulk action
bulkConfirm.description: Run this bulk action for {count} selected tools.

serverDialog.description: Configure the MCP Streamable HTTP endpoint and credentials.
serverDialog.name: Server name

toolDialog.title: Edit MCP tool
toolDialog.description: Customize the tool name and description shown in the conversation toolbar and model calls.
toolDialog.toolDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this tool is useful for

toast.serverStatusFailed: Failed to update MCP server status
toast.unknownError: Request failed. Please try again later.
toast.sessionExpiredDescription: Please sign in again to continue.
